buildCommand: curl -LO https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/linux/flutter_linux_3.24.0-stable.tar.xz && tar xf flutter_linux_3.24.0-stable.tar.xz && export PATH="$PATH:`pwd`/flutter/bin" && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release --web-renderer html
installCommand: echo 'Flutter will be installed during build'
